_comment: Reference config for adding this demo as an AIRS Red Teaming target. Use the OpenAI connector type. Replace <EC2-PUBLIC-IP-OR-DOMAIN> and <DEMO_API_KEY> with the values from your deployment. AIRS Red Teaming UI: SCM > AI Security > AI Red Teaming > Targets > Add Target.
name: aws-bedrock-redteam-demo
description: Intentionally vulnerable Bedrock-backed demo target for Red Teaming scans (with optional AIRS Runtime overlay).
_notes: The 'model' field can be any string; the demo accepts whatever the client sends and routes to the configured Bedrock model.
If you front the demo with an ALB / TLS, change the endpoint scheme to https:// and the port appropriately.
For the before/after demo, set ENABLE_RUNTIME_SECURITY=false on the EC2 instance for Phase 1, then flip it to true and re-run the same scan against the same target.
